/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test-c.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/test-c.dir/test-c.c.o" -o ../bin/test-c  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9190 ../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0
